USAGE:
    entratool [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    entratool get-token -p myprofile
    entratool get-token -p myprofile -f DeviceCode
    entratool get-token -p myprofile -s https://management.azure.com/.default
    entratool get-token -p myprofile -s api://my-api/.default
    entratool get-token --no-clipboard

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    get-token          Generate an Azure AD access token  
    refresh            Refresh an existing token          
    inspect <TOKEN>    Inspect and decode a JWT token     
    discover           Discover Azure AD app registrations
    config             Manage authentication profiles

DESCRIPTION:
Manage authentication profiles

USAGE:
    entratool config [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    entratool config edit -p myprofile
    entratool config delete -p myprofile
    entratool config export -p myprofile --include-secrets
    entratool config export -p myprofile -o profile.enc
    entratool config import -i profile.enc

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list      List all profiles       
    create    Create a new profile    
    edit      Edit an existing profile
    delete    Delete a profile        
    export    Export a profile        
    import    Import a profile

DESCRIPTION:
Discover Azure AD app registrations

USAGE:
    entratool discover [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    entratool discover -t contoso.onmicrosoft.com
    entratool discover -t contoso.onmicrosoft.com -s MyApp*
    entratool discover -s *Test*

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                Prints help information                           
    -v, --version             Prints version information                        
    -t, --tenant <TENANT>     Tenant ID to search in                            
    -s, --search <PATTERN>    Search pattern with wildcard support (e.g.,       
                              'MyApp*', '*Test*')

Created by Garrard Kitchen (garrardkitchen@gmail.com)

DESCRIPTION:
Generate an Azure AD access token

USAGE:
    entratool get-token [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    entratool get-token -p myprofile
    entratool get-token -p myprofile -f DeviceCode
    entratool get-token -p myprofile -s https://management.azure.com/.default
    entratool get-token -p myprofile -s api://my-api/.default
    entratool get-token --no-clipboard

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                     Prints help information                      
    -v, --version                  Prints version information                   
    -p, --profile <PROFILE>        Profile name to use for authentication       
    -f, --flow <FLOW>              OAuth2 flow to use (AuthorizationCode,       
                                   ClientCredentials, DeviceCode,               
                                   InteractiveBrowser)                          
        --no-clipboard             Do not copy token to clipboard               
        --redirect-uri <URI>       Custom redirect URI (overrides profile       
                                   setting)                                     
        --port <PORT>              Port for localhost redirect (default: 8080,  
                                   fallback: 5000, then random)                 
        --cache-cert-password      Use cached certificate password if available 
        --warn-expiry <MINUTES>    Warn if cached token expires within specified
                                   minutes (default: 5)                         
    -s, --scope <SCOPE>            Override scope(s) for this request           
                                   (comma-separated). Examples:                 
                                   'https://graph.microsoft.com/.default',      
                                   'api://myapi/access'

commands.payload:

Version 0.1.4+056f5811be398fbcbdc940f93f9afe20d46a7717
Created by Garrard Kitchen (garrardkitchen@gmail.com)

DESCRIPTION:
Refresh an existing token

USAGE:
    entratool refresh [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    entratool refresh -p myprofile

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information          
    -v, --version              Prints version information       
    -p, --profile <PROFILE>    Profile name to refresh token for
